28.reason: Error: For data <= root->data, should go right (since right child includes values >= root), but this places equal values in left subtree. Change condition to `if(data < root->data)` left, else right.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: For data <= root->data, should go right (since right child includes values >= root), but this places equal values in left subtree. Change condition to `if(data < root->data)` left, else right.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  此处应改为右子树插入：root->rc=create(root->rc,data)

22.reason: [Logical Error] The problem specifies that the right child's value must be greater than or equal to the root. The condition `data > root->data` incorrectly places equal values in the left subtree. It should be `data >= root->data`.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  条件错误：应改为 if(data < root->data) 以满足左子树小于根，右子树大于等于根

33.reason: Missing NULL check for root at the beginning of the function. If the input n is 0, root will be NULL, and accessing root->lc will cause a segmentation fault.

61.reason: [If the input n is 0, then p remains NULL, and calling print(p,1) will dereference a NULL pointer, causing undefined behavior or crash. The print function does not check if root is NULL before accessing root->lc or root->rc.]
